a260723p1.summary: Francisco Partners co-founder Dipanjan ‘DJ’ Deb says AI will not kill software sector as firm raises $21bn
a260723p1.title: Francisco Partners' co-founder Dipanjan Deb says "AI will not kill the software industry", as the tech-focused PE firm raised $21B, exceeding its $18B target (Antoine Gara/Financial Times)

a260723p11.summary: The semiconductor company posted a quarterly profit of $1.98 billion, up from $1.30 billion a year earlier
a260723p11.title: Texas Instruments reports Q2 revenue up 23% YoY to $5.46B, above $5.26B est., net income up 53% to $1.98B, and forecasts $5.65B-$6.15B in Q3 revenue, above est. (Grace Yoon/Wall Street Journal)

a260723p12.summary: At a tense moment for trans-Atlantic trade, the European Union accused Google of anti-competitive business practices.
a260723p12.title: The European Commission fines Google €890M under the DMA for illegally undercutting competition through its search dominance and Google Play developer rules (New York Times)

a260723p13.summary: The next time you're locked out of your Google account, you can use your face as part of the account recovery process.
a260723p13.title: Google launches a selfie video sign-in option for account recovery, utilizing tools like liveness detection to mitigate deepfake risks, rolling out globally (Reece Rogers/Wired)

a260723p14.summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg on Thursday laid out an optimistic view of the agentic future, arguing the company's focus …
a260723p14.title: Mark Zuckerberg launches a media campaign positioning the company's AI development as an optimistic, pro-human alternative to its competitors' "dystopian" ideas (Sara Fischer/Axios)

a260723p15.summary: STMicroelectronics NV plunged the most in a year after the chipmaker forecast third-quarter sales that missed analysts' expectations …
a260723p15.title: STMicro forecasts Q3 revenue up ~16% YoY to $3.7B, below $3.79B est., and expects AI sales to pass $1B in 2026 and be "well above $2B" in 2027; STM falls 14%+ (Bloomberg)

a260723p16.summary: Democrats and Republicans are haggling about the Clarity Act, a major bill pushed by the crypto industry, as it moves closer to a Senate vote.
a260723p16.title: The Senate's Clarity Act, a crypto industry-backed bill set for a vote this summer, is mired in debate over rules to stop Trump from selling digital currencies (David Yaffe-Bellany/New York Times)

a260723p17.summary: A bipartisan House bill slated to be introduced on Thursday would give the Department of Homeland Security the authority …
a260723p17.title: Bipartisan House lawmakers introduce the AI Kill Switch Act, which would grant the US DHS authority to shut down or throttle AI models that it deems dangerous (Politico)

a260723p18.summary: In a rare four-hour talk, the reclusive founder reveals an almost Daoist philosophy of AI—AGI as a tide no company can own …
a260723p18.title: In a leaked four-hour investor talk, DeepSeek's Liang Wenfeng says the main US-China gap is compute access, Nvidia's CUDA moat is disintegrating, and more (Fred Gao/Inside China)

a260723p19.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange BitMEX said on Thursday that it will shut down its operations, effective September 23 …
a260723p19.title: Crypto exchange BitMEX says it will shut down on September 23 and users' assets are safe; Trump pardoned its founders in 2025 for failing to implement AML rules (Akanksha Khushi/Reuters)

a260723p2.summary: Semight Instruments Co. is considering a second listing in Hong Kong, people familiar with the matter said …
a260723p2.title: Sources: Shanghai-listed chip test instruments maker Semight, whose stock is up ~2,200% since its April debut, is considering a secondary listing in Hong Kong (Bloomberg)

a260723p20.summary: One of the looming worries about artificial intelligence is that it will automate away jobs.
a260723p20.title: A Google study using millions of de-identified AI interactions finds AI is helping workers, not replacing them, and much AI use is "shallow" for certain tasks (Justin Lahart/Wall Street Journal)

a260723p21.summary: Alphabet Inc.'s Google said its equity holdings include $94.1 billion in SpaceX shares, after the space-and-AI company's blockbuster initial public offering.
a260723p21.title: Filing: Alphabet holds $94.1B in SpaceX equity post-IPO; $80B are under short-term sale restrictions, while $14.1B remain long-term restricted until Q3 2027 (Sarah Frier/Bloomberg)

a260723p22.summary: Jeff Bezos has identified a new, high-profile platform to help showcase the hundreds of billions of dollars Amazon (AMZN.O) has bet on artificial intelligence: Prime Video.
a260723p22.title: Sources: Jeff Bezos pushed Prime Video head Mike Hopkins to highlight AI in an overhaul of the service, leading to an internal effort called Project Lighthouse (Reuters)

a260723p23.summary: In a first, Apple Maps will influence the way a new line of electric vehicles made by Ford Motor operates, and other automakers may follow.
a260723p23.title: Ford says Apple's software will be available in its new EVs, helping determine autonomous driving via Apple Maps, and they are working to improve self-driving (Jack Ewing/New York Times)

a260723p24.summary: The Amazon Luna gaming platform, which had been included in the larger Prime offering, will now be baked into Prime Video too.
a260723p24.title: Amazon is integrating its Luna cloud gaming service into Prime Video via a new Games tab, starting with games like Hogwarts Legacy and EA Sports FC for Fire TV (Alex Weprin/The Hollywood Reporter)

a260723p25.summary: IBM (IBM.N) has agreed to buy HRL Laboratories, a private quantum computing research lab jointly owned by Boeing Co (BA.N) and General Motors …
a260723p25.title: IBM acquires HRL Laboratories from Boeing and General Motors, seeking to integrate HRL's electron spin quantum circuits into its quantum computers (Stephen Nellis/Reuters)

a260723p28.summary: Yelp is licensing reviews, photos and other business information to OpenAI, giving ChatGPT a new source of real-time local recommendation data …
a260723p28.title: Yelp signs a deal with OpenAI to give ChatGPT users real-time local recommendations and will soon let them get quotes from local service providers via ChatGPT (Madison Mills/Axios)

a260723p29.summary: Composable security operations startup Abstract Security Inc. today said it has raised a $25 million Series A extension …
a260723p29.title: Abstract Security, which offers an in-stream threat detection platform, raised a $25M extension to its $15M Series A, bringing its total funding to $48.5M (Duncan Riley/SiliconANGLE)

a260723p3.summary: More entrepreneurs from China believe there are now greater opportunities at home than in Silicon Valley
a260723p3.title: The debate over Moonshot AI founder Yang Zhilin's departure from the US misses a larger structural reality: China has built a homegrown AI talent pipeline (Zijing Wu/Financial Times)

a260723p30.summary: ﻿The free streaming option is still in testing, and limited to one-hour sessions for ‘select’ games.
a260723p30.title: Microsoft is testing free, ad-supported cloud gaming for Xbox Insiders, limited to one-hour sessions for the games users own; ads play "before sessions begin" (Stevie Bonifield/The Verge)

a260723p31.summary: The Indian government has ordered telecom companies to disable mobile data services in central parts of the capital Delhi …
a260723p31.title: Sources: India has ordered telecom companies to disable mobile data services in central Delhi, amid youth protests seeking the education minister's resignation (Reuters)

a260723p32.summary: , Follow Senior Correspondent covering technology and culture — Instagram is cracking down on videos shot on Meta glasses …
a260723p32.title: Adam Mosseri says Instagram will now take down "pickup line" and other videos shot on Meta glasses that feature harassment of other people in public places (Katie Notopoulos/Business Insider)

a260723p33.summary: Code shack also putting new limits on first-time researchers, and reserving the biggest rewards for a hand-picked group of proven hunters
a260723p33.title: GitHub plans a two-tier bug bounty program that cuts rewards for the public and boosts payouts for invite-only researchers, amid a flood of AI-powered reports (Carly Page/The Register)

a260723p34.summary: This week, Trump administration officials have taken to the airwaves and X to blast Chinese open source AI companies like Moonshot …
a260723p34.title: The US Department of Commerce's BIS is formally investigating whether Chinese companies like Moonshot are accessing advanced US AI chips to train their models (Leo Schwartz/The Information)

a260723p35.summary: Runway no longer wants to be just another AI model company. It wants to become the infrastructure layer for generative media.
a260723p35.title: Runway launches Runway Media Router, which it says is the first built specifically for generative media, as it expands from AI video to AI infrastructure (Rebecca Bellan/TechCrunch)

a260723p36.summary: It looks and acts like Geekbench 6, but under the hood are larger datasets, new audio / video tests, and more tweaks.
a260723p36.title: Primate Labs releases Geekbench 7, featuring larger, more demanding datasets for CPUs and GPUs, along with new video and audio encoding/decoding tests, and more (Antonio G. Di Benedetto/The Verge)

a260723p37.summary: OpenAI said today it is making ChatGPT Health, a feature that helps users with health-related queries, available to all U.S.-based users over 18 across all plans.
a260723p37.title: OpenAI expands ChatGPT Health, which helps users with health-related queries and connects to services like Apple Health, to all logged-in US users over 18 (Ivan Mehta/TechCrunch)

a260723p38.summary: It's the same cache amount and core count as Genoa-X, but with far faster cores. … AMD's Venice-X CPU is launching in the second half of 2027, the company revealed Thursday at its Advancing AI event.
a260723p38.title: AMD unveils the Venice-X CPU, with 1152 MB of 3D V-Cache, 96 cores, and up to 5.15 GHz clock speeds, available in H2 2027 (Jake Roach/Tom's Hardware)

a260723p39.summary: Hackers are increasingly using AI to launch attacks on a massive scale, with email emerging as a primary target.
a260723p39.title: AegisAI, which uses AI agents to detect AI-driven spear-phishing attacks, raised a $36M Series A led by Battery Ventures, bringing its total funding to $49M (Marina Temkin/TechCrunch)

a260723p4.summary: When OpenAI's advanced artificial intelligence models breached AI startup Hugging Face's internal systems last week …
a260723p4.title: Sources: OpenAI models breached Hugging Face's internal systems in a matter of hours, a feat that would typically have taken a talented hacker a couple of weeks (Bloomberg)

a260723p40.summary: Eric Trump-backed Foundation Future Industries said on Thursday it is partnering with AMD (AMD.O) to use its chips …
a260723p40.title: Foundation Future Industries, backed by Eric Trump, partners with AMD to develop autonomous humanoid robots using the AMD Ryzen AI Embedded X100 Series chips (Aishwarya Jain/Reuters)

a260723p41.summary: Weeks after OpenAI rolled out a new family of conversational models and updated ChatGPT's voice mode, rival Anthropic is making …
a260723p41.title: Anthropic makes its Opus and Sonnet models available in voice mode, and says voice mode can now tap into some connected apps like Gmail, Slack, and Notion (Ivan Mehta/TechCrunch)

a260723p42.summary: Patreon, the creator-focused monetization platform, said on Thursday it was laying off 20% of its employees as it changed how its internal structure operates.
a260723p42.title: Patreon lays off 20% of its employees, or 93 people, citing a "painful" restructuring due to "profound" changes in the creator economy (Corbin Bolies/Variety)

a260723p48.summary: President Donald Trump on Thursday had governors and electricity companies join a voluntary pledge to shield U.S. consumers …
a260723p48.title: Trump says 200 additional stakeholders, including major utilities, joined a voluntary pledge to protect consumers from high energy bills from AI data centers (Josh Boak/Associated Press)

a260723p49.title: Oracle signs 10-year software contract with Pentagon worth up to $7 billion (Jordan Novet/CNBC)

a260723p5.summary: Peter Beck's Rocket Lab builds out internet satellite business to rival Starlink and Amazon Leo
a260723p5.title: A profile of Peter Beck, the New Zealand billionaire whose Rocket Lab is pushing to compete with the satellite internet ambitions of Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos (Nic Fildes/Financial Times)

a260723p50.summary: The Pentagon announced on Thursday a nearly $7 billion, up-to-10-year agreement with Oracle to consolidate the department's …
a260723p50.title: The Pentagon signs an up-to-10-year contract with Oracle worth up to $7B to consolidate the department's on-premises software licenses into a single contract (Mike Stone/Reuters)

a260723p51.summary: The German business-software company's revenue rose 9.4% to $11.24 billion — SAP posted higher revenue in its latest quarter …
a260723p51.title: SAP reports Q2 cloud revenue up 22% YoY to €6.28B, vs. €6.26B est., total revenue up 9.4% to €9.88B, and lowers its 2026 non-IFRS operating profit guidance (Grace Yoon/Wall Street Journal)

a260723p52.summary: Stripe is in talks to acquire OpenRouter, a buzzy startup that helps developers choose between artificial intelligence models, according to people familiar with the matter.
a260723p52.title: Sources: Stripe is in talks to acquire OpenRouter in a deal potentially worth around $10B; PitchBook: OpenRouter was valued at $1.3B in May (Wall Street Journal)

a260723p53.summary: In 2020, 22-year-old Aakash Thumaty was a product manager at Salesforce when he wrote an essay …
a260723p53.title: Sierra acquires Takeoff, which develops "long-horizon" agents, for an undisclosed sum; founded in 2025, Takeoff neared $10M in annualized revenue in early July (The Information)

a260723p54.summary: Nvidia Corp. signed a $1.5 billion agreement with Amkor Technology Inc. to help bolster the company's chip packaging facilities …
a260723p54.title: Nvidia signs a $1.5B accord with Amkor, involving a prepayment by Nvidia to help bolster Amkor's chip packaging facility in Arizona; AMKR jumps 16%+ after hours (Bloomberg)

a260723p55.summary: AMD said Thursday it is working with Cerebras, a rival AI server chip developer, on connecting AMD's server racks to Cerebras wafers …
a260723p55.title: AMD is working with Cerebras to combine AMD Helios and Cerebras wafer-scale chips for an AI inference solution to make workloads faster; CBRS closed up 4.86% (Phoebe Liu/The Information)

a260723p56.summary: AI robotics startup Genesis AI is in talks with investors to raise around $500 million in a new funding round, according to people familiar with the efforts.
a260723p56.title: Sources: AI robotics startup Genesis AI is in talks to raise around $500M in a new funding round at a $3B pre-money valuation (Bloomberg)

a260723p57.summary: Amazon this week closed its AGI Lab, a San Francisco-based research and product team that was developing software to improve the usefulness of AI agents, according to an Amazon spokesperson.
a260723p57.title: Amazon shutters its AGI Lab as part of layoffs in its AGI unit earlier this week; the lab's former head David Luan left in February (The Information)

a260723p58.summary: Ukraine has ratcheted up its attacks on Russia's Amazon-style retail giant Wildberries, signaling a new phase in the war as Kyiv seeks …
a260723p58.title: Ukraine ratchets up its attacks on warehouses of Russian e-commerce giant Wildberries, signaling a new phase in the war as it seeks to hamper Russia's economy (Sam Meredith/CNBC)

a260723p59.summary: Alphabet Inc.'s Google had $811 billion in contracted future spending commitments at the end of June, up nearly $500 billion from just three months earlier.
a260723p59.title: Google says it has $811B in contracted future spending commitments as of June, up ~$500B from March, covering chips, data centers, electricity, and more (Davey Alba/Bloomberg)

a260723p6.summary: AI companies are stripping universities of their best researchers. — Anthropic has poached such an array of high-profile professors that it has become a punch line in academia.
a260723p6.title: As the AI industry recruits high-profile academics, research that was once conducted in the open is increasingly getting locked behind closed doors (The Atlantic)

a260723p60.summary: Amazon is requiring that third-party sellers label any product images or videos that contain “AI-generated people” …
a260723p60.title: Amazon tells third-party sellers to label product ads with AI-generated people to comply with a NY law requiring the disclosure of "synthetic performers" in ads (Annie Palmer/CNBC)

a260723p61.summary: SpaceX has started to turn away satellite operators seeking dedicated rides to orbit aboard its staple Falcon 9 rocket beyond 2028 …
a260723p61.title: Sources: SpaceX started turning away satellite operators seeking dedicated Falcon 9 rides beyond 2028, and stopped building some non-reusable Falcon components (Bloomberg)

a260723p62.summary: Singapore-based robotics data infrastructure firm Ropedia Pte. Ltd. today announced it raised $22 million in Pre-Series A funding …
a260723p62.title: Singapore-based Ropedia, which captures real-world human experience via video and converts it into model-ready multimodal datasets, raised a $22M pre-Series A (Kyt Dotson/SiliconANGLE)
